metadata.name: Argo CD
metadata.description: Helm values template for Argo CD with ingress, TLS, controller or repo-server sizing, Dex, Redis, and metrics toggles for homelab GitOps clusters.

items.name: public_url
items.title: Public URL
items.description: Public URL Argo CD should advertise to users and callbacks.

items.name: server_insecure
items.title: Server Insecure
items.description: Let the ingress controller terminate TLS in front of `argocd-server`.

items.name: ingress_enabled
items.title: Ingress
items.description: Expose Argo CD through a Kubernetes ingress.

items.name: ingress_class_name
items.title: Ingress Class
items.description: IngressClass name used for the Argo CD server ingress.

items.name: ingress_hostname
items.title: Ingress Hostname
items.description: Hostname used for the Argo CD ingress.

items.name: ingress_path
items.title: Ingress Path
items.description: Path exposed by the Argo CD ingress.

items.name: ingress_entrypoints
items.title: Traefik Entrypoints
items.description: Traefik entrypoints annotation for the ingress.

items.name: ingress_middleware
items.title: Traefik Middleware
items.description: Optional Traefik middleware reference attached to the Argo CD ingress.

items.name: ingress_tls_enabled
items.title: Ingress TLS
items.description: Enable TLS for the Argo CD ingress.

items.name: ingress_tls_secret
items.title: TLS Secret
items.description: TLS secret name used when cert-manager is not managing the ingress certificate.

items.name: ingress_cert_manager_enabled
items.title: Cert-Manager
items.description: Annotate the ingress for cert-manager certificate issuance.

items.name: ingress_cluster_issuer
items.title: ClusterIssuer
items.description: ClusterIssuer used when cert-manager handles ingress certificates.

items.name: controller_replicas
items.title: Controller Replicas
items.description: Number of Argo CD application controller replicas.

items.name: repo_server_replicas
items.title: Repo Server Replicas
items.description: Number of Argo CD repo-server replicas.

items.name: server_replicas
items.title: Server Replicas
items.description: Number of Argo CD API server replicas.

items.name: dex_enabled
items.title: Dex
items.description: Deploy bundled Dex for SSO scenarios that still use the Argo CD Dex component.

items.name: redis_enabled
items.title: Bundled Redis
items.description: Deploy bundled Redis. Disable only if you provide Redis separately.

items.name: metrics_service_monitor_enabled
items.title: ServiceMonitor
items.description: Create ServiceMonitor resources for enabled component metrics.

items.name: controller_metrics_enabled
items.title: Controller Metrics
items.description: Expose metrics from the application controller.

items.name: repo_server_metrics_enabled
items.title: Repo Server Metrics
items.description: Expose metrics from the repo-server.

items.name: server_metrics_enabled
items.title: Server Metrics
items.description: Expose metrics from the Argo CD API server.

items.name: dex_metrics_enabled
items.title: Dex Metrics
items.description: Expose metrics from Dex when Dex is enabled.

items.name: redis_metrics_enabled
items.title: Redis Metrics
items.description: Expose metrics from bundled Redis when Redis is enabled.
